result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  TCC [command] [options]

Options:
  --auditFile <auditFile>  Path to the audit log file
  -v, --verbose            Verbose output
  --logPath <logPath>      Log path
  --version                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

Commands:
  auto-decompress      Continuous decompress from Google Cloud Storage
  compress <source>    Compress specified files/folders
  decompress <source>  Decompress specified files/folders
  benchmark <source>   Benchmark mode

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  TCC [command] [options]

Options:
  --auditFile <auditFile>  Path to the audit log file
  -v, --verbose            Verbose output
  --logPath <logPath>      Log path
  --version                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

Commands:
  auto-decompress      Continuous decompress from Google Cloud Storage
  compress <source>    Compress specified files/folders
  decompress <source>  Decompress specified files/folders
  benchmark <source>   Benchmark mode

result.stdout:
Description:
  Continuous decompress from Google Cloud Storage

Usage:
  TCC auto-decompress [options]

Options:
  -o, --destination-dir, --output <destination-dir> (REQUIRED)  Output directory path
  -t, --threads <threads>                                       Number of threads [1,2...N] / all
  -f, --failFast                                                Fail-fast mode
  --ignore-missing-full                                         Still decompress DIFF when FULL is missing
  -p, --password <password>                                     encryption password
  -e, --passFile <passFile>                                     file with password on one line
  -k, --key <key>                                               Public key for compression, private key for decompression
  -s, --slackSecret <slackSecret>                               Slack xoxp Secret
  -c, --slackChannel <slackChannel>                             Slack #channel name
  -b, --bucketName <bucketName>                                 Slack notification bucket name
  --slackOnlyOnError                                            Send slack message only on warning or error
  --googleStorageCredential <googleStorageCredential>           Google Cloud Storage credential json, either full path or base64
  --googleProjectId <googleProjectId>                           Google Cloud Pub/Sub, storage projectId
  --googleSubscriptionId <googleSubscriptionId>                 Google Cloud Pub/Sub subscriptionId
  --temporaryDirectory <temporaryDirectory>                     Directory where archive are downloaded temporary
  --auditFile <auditFile>                                       Path to the audit log file
  -v, --verbose                                                 Verbose output
  --logPath <logPath>                                           Log path
  -?, -h, --help                                                Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Compress specified files/folders

Usage:
  TCC compress <source> [options]

Arguments:
  <source>  Files or Folders to compress

Options:
  -o, --destination-dir, --output <destination-dir> (REQUIRED)  Output directory path
  -t, --threads <threads>                                       Number of threads [1,2...N] / all
  -f, --failFast                                                Fail-fast mode
  --ignore-missing-full                                         Still decompress DIFF when FULL is missing
  -p, --password <password>                                     encryption password
  -e, --passFile <passFile>                                     file with password on one line
  -k, --key <key>                                               Public key for compression, private key for decompression
  -s, --slackSecret <slackSecret>                               Slack xoxp Secret
  -c, --slackChannel <slackChannel>                             Slack #channel name
  -b, --bucketName <bucketName>                                 Slack notification bucket name
  --slackOnlyOnError                                            Send slack message only on warning or error
  -i, --individual                                              Individual mode : create distinct archives for each file / folder in source
  -a, --algo, --algorithm <Brotli|Lz4|Zstd>                     Algorithm : Lz4 (default), Brotli, Zstd [default: Lz4]
  -r, --compression-ratio, --ratio <compression-ratio>          Compression ratio. Valid values are : lz4 [1,9], brotli [1,11], zstd [1,19]
  -m, --mode <Diff|Full>                                        Backup mode : Full or Diff. (Default = Full if no Diff, and Diff if Full already exists)
                                                                Full : force a full backup for all sources.
                                                                Diff : Archive delta since last full
  --retries <retries>                                           Number seconds retring a failed compression job
  --filter <filter>                                             Optional filters
  --exclude <exclude>                                           Exclusion filters
  --folderPerDay                                                Creates a sub folder per day
  --maximumRetention <maximumRetention>                         Maximum retention in minutes
  --boostRatio <boostRatio>                                     When more than 90% of Diff will be processed, allow to multiply the number of thread.
                                                                Ex : boostRatio 4 when having 8 thread will switch process on 32 threads
  --cleanupTime <cleanupTime>                                   Specify the time, in hours, after which the backup files are deleted. If no time is specified, then no backup files are deleted.
  --uploadMode <AzureSdk|GoogleCloudStorage|None>               Upload mode
  --azBlobUrl <azBlobUrl>                                       Azure blob storage URL
  --azBlobContainer <azBlobContainer>                           Azure blob storage container id
  --azBlobSaS <azBlobSaS>                                       Azure blob storage SaS token
  --azThread <azThread>                                         Azure blob maximum parallel threads
  --googleStorageBucketName <googleStorageBucketName>           Google Cloud Storage destination bucket
  --googleStorageCredential <googleStorageCredential>           Google Cloud Storage credential json, either full path or base64
  --auditFile <auditFile>                                       Path to the audit log file
  -v, --verbose                                                 Verbose output
  --logPath <logPath>                                           Log path
  -?, -h, --help                                                Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Compress specified files/folders

Usage:
  TCC compress <source> [options]

Arguments:
  <source>  Files or Folders to compress

Options:
  -o, --destination-dir, --output <destination-dir> (REQUIRED)  Output directory path
  -t, --threads <threads>                                       Number of threads [1,2...N] / all
  -f, --failFast                                                Fail-fast mode
  --ignore-missing-full                                         Still decompress DIFF when FULL is missing
  -p, --password <password>                                     encryption password
  -e, --passFile <passFile>                                     file with password on one line
  -k, --key <key>                                               Public key for compression, private key for decompression
  -s, --slackSecret <slackSecret>                               Slack xoxp Secret
  -c, --slackChannel <slackChannel>                             Slack #channel name
  -b, --bucketName <bucketName>                                 Slack notification bucket name
  --slackOnlyOnError                                            Send slack message only on warning or error
  -i, --individual                                              Individual mode : create distinct archives for each file / folder in source
  -a, --algo, --algorithm <Brotli|Lz4|Zstd>                     Algorithm : Lz4 (default), Brotli, Zstd [default: Lz4]
  -r, --compression-ratio, --ratio <compression-ratio>          Compression ratio. Valid values are : lz4 [1,9], brotli [1,11], zstd [1,19]
  -m, --mode <Diff|Full>                                        Backup mode : Full or Diff. (Default = Full if no Diff, and Diff if Full already exists)
                                                                Full : force a full backup for all sources.
                                                                Diff : Archive delta since last full
  --retries <retries>                                           Number seconds retring a failed compression job
  --filter <filter>                                             Optional filters
  --exclude <exclude>                                           Exclusion filters
  --folderPerDay                                                Creates a sub folder per day
  --maximumRetention <maximumRetention>                         Maximum retention in minutes
  --boostRatio <boostRatio>                                     When more than 90% of Diff will be processed, allow to multiply the number of thread.
                                                                Ex : boostRatio 4 when having 8 thread will switch process on 32 threads
  --cleanupTime <cleanupTime>                                   Specify the time, in hours, after which the backup files are deleted. If no time is specified, then no backup files are deleted.
  --uploadMode <AzureSdk|GoogleCloudStorage|None>               Upload mode
  --azBlobUrl <azBlobUrl>                                       Azure blob storage URL
  --azBlobContainer <azBlobContainer>                           Azure blob storage container id
  --azBlobSaS <azBlobSaS>                                       Azure blob storage SaS token
  --azThread <azThread>                                         Azure blob maximum parallel threads
  --googleStorageBucketName <googleStorageBucketName>           Google Cloud Storage destination bucket
  --googleStorageCredential <googleStorageCredential>           Google Cloud Storage credential json, either full path or base64
  --auditFile <auditFile>                                       Path to the audit log file
  -v, --verbose                                                 Verbose output
  --logPath <logPath>                                           Log path
  -?, -h, --help                                                Show help and usage information
